hero.subtitle: Engineering research that moves from lab bench to real-world impact — in medicine, defense, avionics, energy, and beyond.

about.title: Who we are
paragraphs: A UW engineering research lab at the crossroads of sensors, energy, and automation. We take on hard problems in medicine, avionics, wearable tech, defense, and sustainability — and see them through to real-world application. Associates have gone on to found startups, publish research, and land roles at top companies.

The lab runs like a giant RPG: quests, battlestations, squads, a sandbox for newcomers, and mission-critical teams for high performers. SEAL operates its own AI-first infrastructure — a persistent lab assistant that integrates real-time sensor data, manages computational resources autonomously, and automates research coordination across all teams. We're always open to motivated people — experience is welcome, but never required.

items.name: ITAC
items.description: Energy assessments and technical solutions for industrial efficiency and sustainability.

items.name: Plasma
items.description: High-voltage plasma R&D with applications in medical devices, filtration, avionics, and satellites.

items.name: Biz/Tech
items.description: Spin-off formation, grant proposals, scholarship coordination, and lab commercialization.

items.name: Embedded
items.description: Sensor design, weak-signal detection, and signal processing across agriculture, scientific measurement, and environmental monitoring.

items.name: Sudoku
items.description: Software platforms, web systems, apps, scripts, and media production.

items.name: Teaching
items.description: Novel teaching tools and curricula, deployed in UW courses and institutions worldwide.

items.heading: Earn Academic Credit
items.description: Take on 1–3 credits while shipping real work on active projects. Flexible commitment, real output.

items.heading: Do Real Research
items.description: Get hands-on with graduate-level work at one of the world's top public research universities.

items.heading: Build Your Resume
items.description: You learn by doing. Every project teaches something concrete and demonstrable.

items.heading: Publish and Win Scholarships
items.description: SEAL actively supports students pursuing publications and scholarships — especially valuable for anyone with graduate school in mind.

items.heading: Build With AI
items.description: Gain hands-on experience with AI-first engineering — from LLM integration and agentic systems to real-time sensor fusion and autonomous resource management. The skills every industry is hiring for.
